headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Joins AI Materials Foundry To Help Shape Future Chip Materials
summary: Lam Research joined the AI Materials Foundry as a founding partner, a new global initiative led by CuspAI. The consortium brings together more than 45 technology and industrial companies to accelerate advanced materials discovery for semiconductors using AI and shared lab resources. The collaboration focuses on improving access to critical materials at a time when rare metal supply and next generation chip development are key industry issues. Lam Research, traded as NasdaqGS:LRCX, is tying...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Lam Research, Raises Price Target to $355
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Mark Lipacis   maintains Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $300 to $355.

headline: CuspAI Launches ‘AI Materials Foundry’ a Global Network to Accelerate Breakthrough Discoveries
summary: CAMBRIDGE, England & SAN FRANCISCO & SINGAPORE, July 20, 2026--The AI Materials Foundry brings together a global network of data, labs, compute and scientific expertise, orchestrated by a single agentic platform.
